component.name: ThirdFlare One
component.summary: Unofficial Cloudflare One client via warp-cli

description.p: ThirdFlare One is an unofficial third-party client for Cloudflare One / WARP. It wraps the host Cloudflare WARP client (warp-cli) with a local API and optional browser UI. The Flatpak bundles Node and calls warp-cli on the host through flatpak-spawn --host. Cloudflare WARP must already be installed on the system.
Not affiliated with Cloudflare, Inc. Cloudflare and Cloudflare One are trademarks of Cloudflare, Inc.
ThirdFlare One packaging and Flathub-ready app ID.
